name: Quantum Management
description: Query and visualize policies, rulebases, access/NAT/VPN rules, and network objects from Check Point management servers.

name: Management Logs
description: Query and analyze connection, audit, and monitoring logs from Check Point management servers.

name: Threat Prevention
description: Manage and inspect threat protections, IPS blade status, protection profiles, and IOC feeds.

name: HTTPS Inspection
description: Query and analyze HTTPS inspection rulebases, layers, and gateway SSL/TLS inspection policies.

name: Policy Insights
description: Retrieve AI-generated policy insights — unused objects, overly permissive rules, and optimization suggestions — per layer and rule.

name: Quantum Gateway CLI
description: Run gateway CLI commands for hardware diagnostics, network configuration, HA monitoring, and SecureXL performance analysis.

name: Gateway Connection Analysis
description: Start and stop live connection debug sessions on a gateway to trace packet paths, NAT rules applied, and policy decisions.
